speaker: prospect
text: Hi, you've reached John Smith at Acme Corporation. I'm not available right now. Please leave a message after the beep and I'll return your call as soon as possible. Thank you.

speaker: rep
text: Hi John, this is Sarah from PhoneBurner. I was calling to follow up on the email I sent about our power dialer platform. Give me a call back when you get a chance at 555-0199. Thanks!
